title: Cuneiform Tablet #0817: Old Babylonian Ration List
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a ration list document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a ration list document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Babylonian period. Ration List document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records ration list matters typical of Old Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
